aboutPage.heroDescription: {{brand}} delivers modern and classic furniture with full interior design solutions—fusing elegance with function for homes, hospitality, and workplaces.

craft.title: Modern & classic furniture house
craft.subtitle: We create unique furniture and interior concepts that blend refinement with practicality, adding a signature touch to every living or working space.
craft.bullet1: Producers and distributors of both modern and classic furnishings and décor.
craft.bullet2: Integrated design, material, and lighting solutions tailored to each client journey.
craft.bullet3: Concierge support in multiple languages to keep projects moving with precision.

timeline1.title: Craft roots
timeline1.description: {{brand}} begins as a passionate team in modern and classic furniture and interior décor.

timeline2.title: Production & distribution
timeline2.description: We expand into producing and distributing premium furnishings with curated décor lines.

timeline3.title: Turnkey interiors
timeline3.description: Complete interior concepts with custom materials, lighting, and installation partners.

timeline4.title: Global concierge
timeline4.description: Multilingual project support and rapid presentations delivered across regions.

process1.title: Discovery
process1.desc: Curators confirm function, volume, and finish direction.

process2.desc: CAD + fabric proposals shared in 24 hours.

process3.title: Production
process3.desc: 6–8 weeks average lead time with white-glove freight.

sections.heroTitle: Crafting luxury interiors for remarkable lives.
sections.heroSubtitle: A curated portfolio of furniture, collections, and bespoke projects across the globe.
sections.newsletterSubtitle: Monthly highlights on new collections, collaborations, and invitations.
sections.projectsHeroSubtitle: Private residences, bespoke lounges, and hospitality moments shaped by Sign Dış Ticaret artisans.
sections.aboutStory: We began as a collective passionate about modern and classical furniture, operating in this field for nearly 30 years. Over time we started sharing our creative ideas in the furniture and décor space and worked to turn them into high-quality pieces fit for the international market.
sections.privatePresentationDescription: Share your project brief and our concierge will arrange a multilingual video session or atelier visit within 24 hours.
sections.customOrderSubtitle: Describe the piece you need, preferred dimensions, and any finishing touches. Our design team will reply with sketches and pricing within 24 hours.

contactPage.intro: Send us your brief for residences, hospitality projects, or bespoke furniture by email or phone.

legal.privacyBody1: This privacy statement describes how Sign Foreign Trade (Sign Dış Ticaret) collects, uses, and protects personal data when you browse our website, subscribe to newsletters, or contact our concierge team.
legal.privacyBody2: We gather contact information and project notes solely to fulfill service requests. Data is stored securely via Firebase and can be deleted at any time upon request.
legal.privacyBody3: For any questions please contact info@sign-d.net.
legal.termsBody1: By accessing Sign Foreign Trade (Sign Dış Ticaret) digital experiences, you agree not to reuse content, photography, or trademarks without prior consent. All purchases and bespoke orders are governed by signed project contracts referencing deliverables, timelines, and payment schedules.
legal.termsBody2: Usage of this site constitutes acceptance of our privacy statement and cookie policies. Governing law is Italy and disputes shall be settled in Milan.
